DESC.TITLE: About me
DESC.NAME: José Alejandro Arias
DESC.DESCRIPCION_1: Systems engineer focused on cloud architecture and scalable data-driven solutions on AWS. Experienced in event-driven architectures using S3, Glue, Lambda, API Gateway, and Snowflake. Certified in Linux Essentials and Git Essential.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_2: Strong expertise in software development and system integration with Java, Spring Boot, JavaFX, Angular, and TypeScript. Proficient in container orchestration with Kubernetes and Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure as code.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_3: Experienced in Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and DevOps practices including continuous integration and delivery. Knowledgeable in COBIT 2019, TDD, and MDD (Model Driven Development). Competent in project management tools like Asana and Confluence.
DESC.DESCRIPCION_4: Analytical, creative, and fast learner committed to open-source software and emerging cloud technologies. Passionate about leveraging AI and automation to build robust, efficient solutions. Mentor mindset focused on team growth and knowledge sharing. Interested in solving complex problems at the intersection of data, cloud, and artificial intelligence.

PROYECTOS.SUBTITLE: Portfolio
PROYECTOS.TITLE: Work and Projects
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_1: AWS S3 static website deployment using Terraform. Infrastructure as Code for cloud storage and content delivery.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_2: AWS EC2 instance provisioning with Terraform. Automated cloud infrastructure setup with security groups and networking.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_3: Terragrunt and Terraform projects for cloud orchestration. Multi-environment infrastructure management.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_4: CI/CD pipeline automation using Python. Continuous integration and deployment workflow automation.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_5: Multi-container Docker Compose application. Containerized PHP backend with service orchestration.
PROYECTOS.DESCRIPCION_6: AI-powered frontend application built with TypeScript. Intelligent user interface with machine learning integration.

CARRERA-ITEM.DESCRIPCION_1: Cloud-native solutions development on AWS. Event-driven architectures, container orchestration, and CI/CD automation.

CARRERA-ITEM.DESCRIPCION_3: Hybrid cloud engineering designing serverless architectures with AWS Lambda and S3. Development of scalable cloud-native applications and infrastructure automation.
